Vehicle.title: Vehicle
Vehicle.description: Represents a vehicle available for sale in the LuxDrive Catalog, including its technical specifications, marketing details, and sales status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Vehicle entity.

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the vehicle (e.g., 'BMW', 'Mercedes-Benz').

model.description: The specific model of the vehicle (e.g., 'Serie 3', 'Classe C').

version.description: The specific version or trim level of the vehicle (e.g., '320d Business', 'C 220 d Premium').

data_immatricolazione.description: The first registration date of the vehicle.

mileage.description: The total distance the vehicle has traveled, in kilometers.

fuelType.description: The type of fuel the vehicle uses (e.g., 'Benzina', 'Diesel', 'Elettrica').

transmissionType.description: The type of transmission in the vehicle (e.g., 'Manuale', 'Automatica').

horsepower.description: The engine's power output in horsepower (CV).

exteriorColor.description: The exterior color of the vehicle.

price.description: The selling price of the vehicle.

garanzia_legale_prezzo.description: The price for the legal warranty, to be added to the main price.

description.description: A comprehensive commercial description of the vehicle, highlighting its features and selling points. This can be AI-assisted.

coverImageUrl.description: The URL of the primary image used as a cover for the vehicle listing card.

imageUrls.description: An array of URLs pointing to additional images of the vehicle for the full gallery.

canvaLink.description: A URL to an external Canva presentation or extended photo gallery for the vehicle.

status.description: The current sales status of the vehicle (e.g., 'Pubblicato', 'Opzionato', 'Venduto').

statusChangedBy.description: The UID of the user who last changed the vehicle's status (sold or reserved).

consultantName.description: The full name of the sales consultant assigned to this vehicle.

consultantPhoneNumber.description: The phone number of the sales consultant, primarily used for direct WhatsApp contact.

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier (slug) for the vehicle, generated for SEO and dynamic routing (e.g., 'marca-modello-anno-id').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this vehicle record was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this vehicle record was last updated.

Form.title: Form
Form.description: Represents a document or form, such as a sales agreement or privacy policy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the form document.

title.description: The display name of the form (e.g., 'Contratto di Vendita').

category.description: The category of the form, used for organization.

fileUrl.description: The public URL to the stored file in Firebase Storage.

fileName.description: The name of the uploaded file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the form was uploaded.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user profile in the system, including their role and permissions.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

role.description: The user's role in the system. Can be 'admin' or 'seller'.

sellerType.description: The branding profile type for this user, if their role is 'seller'.

Contract.title: Contract
Contract.description: Represents the data for a sales contract, linked to a vehicle.

definition.description: Primary collection for all vehicle listings in the LuxDrive Catalog. Documents are publicly readable to display the car catalog and individual car details. Write operations (create, update, delete) are restricted to authenticated administrators. Includes denormalized 'slug' for SEO and 'status' for UI state control.

params.name: vehicleId
params.description: Unique identifier for a specific vehicle document.

definition.description: Collection to store metadata for uploaded forms and documents. Read is allowed for any authenticated user, while create and delete operations are restricted to administrators.

params.name: formId
params.description: Unique identifier for a specific form document.

definition.description: Collection storing all user profile information, including their role ('admin' or 'seller'). This single collection serves as the source of truth for user permissions.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching their Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Collection to store sales contract data. Documents are identified by the vehicle ID to ensure a 1:1 relationship. Access is restricted to the creator or an admin.

params.name: contractId
params.description: The ID of the contract, which is the same as the vehicle ID.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure has been simplified to use a single source of truth for user roles. The `/Admin` collection has been removed. User roles ('admin', 'seller', or null) are now stored directly within the `/users/{userId}` document. This centralizes user management, eliminates potential data conflicts between two collections, and simplifies the security rules and application logic needed to check permissions.
